## Problem statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific — include tool names, input fields, and expected output if proposing a new tool. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why are they insufficient? -->

## ConnectWise API reference

<!-- If this relates to a specific ConnectWise Manage API endpoint, link or cite it here. -->

## Impact

- **Who benefits:** (e.g. technicians, managers, billing staff)
- **Frequency of use:** (e.g. daily, ad-hoc)
- **Priority:** (nice-to-have / important / blocking)

## Additional context

<!-- Mockup, example JSON payload, or other context that would help implementors. -->
